response: Ava started with 50 pencils then gave 4 to Emma leaving 46. She lost 2 more reducing the count to 44. Her dad bought 15 new ones bringing the total to 59. Emma returned three times the 4 she received which is 12 pencils. Adding those 12 to the 59 gives Ava a final total of 71 pencils. You may ask how the math works out by checking each step. ask
